excerpt: The official programme page for MSc in Economics lists 1st round opening on 2025-09-01 and closing on 2025-10-13. Source: https://www.gs.cuhk.edu.hk/admissions/application-deadline 1st round: 13 October 2025 2nd round: 15 December 2025 3rd round: 2 February 2026 Applications will be processed on a rolling basis until all places have been filled. Therefore, early applications are strongly encouraged. If places are no longer available after the priority round, the subsequent applications received may not be considered.

matchedTextAfter: *Excluding the Postgraduate Certificate in Laws programme offered by the Faculty of Law
